Natural Gas (NYMEX) â€” CoT Supplementary Methodology

Market: Natural Gas Futures Exchange: NYMEX Role: Energy volatility & regional supply risk
  • Highly idiosyncratic and weather-driven; avoid macro over-interpretation.
  • Crowding primarily signals volatility and squeeze risk.
  • Flows dominate short-term behaviour.
  • Use sparingly as a macro signal; better as an energy stress amplifier.
Interpretation-only methodology. Not a trading signal.
